name: Accruent Facilities & Real Estate Management API
what_it_does: Accruent REST APIs for facilities and real estate management platform suite including FAMIS (facilities management), Lucernex (lease administration), and Maintenance Connection (CMMS). Enables AI agents to manage facility maintenance work order creation, scheduling, and asset lifecycle tracking via FAMIS and Maintenance Connection, handle lease data retrieval and critical date tracking for commercial real estate portfolio management via Lucernex, access space management and occupancy planning data for workplace optimization, retrieve equipment and asset preventive maintenance schedule data for facilities operations, manage compliance tracking for facilities regulatory requirements, handle capital project and construction management data for facility improvements, access energy and utilities data for sustainability reporting, retrieve vendor and contractor management data for facility service procurement, manage room and resource reservation data, and integrate facilities data with ERP, BIM, and enterprise asset management systems.
use_cases: Automating maintenance work orders from facilities management agents
Tracking lease critical dates from real estate portfolio agents
Monitoring asset health from predictive maintenance agents
Managing space utilization from workplace optimization agents
not_for: Residential property management without enterprise IWMS and CMMS needs
Simple ticket systems without integrated lease and facilities management
Consumer facility apps without enterprise real estate portfolio context
best_when: A large healthcare system, university, government agency, or corporate real estate team using Accruent FAMIS, Lucernex, or Maintenance Connection wants AI agents to automate maintenance workflows, lease compliance, asset lifecycle tracking, and space management.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Lucernex lease data drives financial reporting obligations (ASC 842/IFRS 16) — automated lease modification without accounting team review creates financial statement errors. FAMIS healthcare facilities data may include clinical facility compliance requirements (Joint Commission, CMS); automated facilities changes without compliance review creates healthcare regulatory risk. Lease critical date automation without legal review for exercise decisions creates contract compliance issues.

auth.notes: Accruent uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-product credentials (FAMIS, Lucernex, Maintenance Connection have separate API surfaces). Webhooks for work order and lease events. REST API with JSON. Austin, Texas HQ. Private equity (Fortive Corporation acquired 2019; part of Vontier spinoff). FAMIS strong in higher education and government facilities. Lucernex strong in retail and corporate real estate. Competes with IBM Maximo, Planon, and Archibus for enterprise IWMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription per product
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per Accruent product (FAMIS, Lucernex, Maintenance Connection) and user count
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Accruent acquired by Fortive Corporation (2019). Multi-product portfolio: FAMIS (higher education/government), Lucernex (lease management), Maintenance Connection (CMMS), EMS Software (room scheduling), Famis 360 (healthcare). Strong in higher education (FAMIS), healthcare, and retail real estate (Lucernex). Competes with IBM Maximo, Planon, and Archibus for enterprise facilities management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; varies by product module

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Lucernex lease data drives ASC 842/IFRS 16 financial reporting; automated lease modifications without accounting sign-off creates financial statement errors and audit findings
Multi-product API fragmentation — FAMIS, Lucernex, Maintenance Connection, and EMS Software have separate API surfaces; confirm which Accruent product your data lives in before integration
Healthcare FAMIS compliance — FAMIS 360 healthcare facilities data includes Joint Commission and CMS compliance requirements; automated facilities changes affect regulatory compliance status
Lease critical date risk — Lucernex tracks lease option and renewal deadlines with financial consequences; automated date management requires legal review before option exercise decisions
Fortive/Vontier complexity — Accruent corporate structure changed with Fortive acquisition and Vontier spinoff; verify current product ownership and support organization
EMS Software room scheduling — EMS Software (room/resource scheduling) is a separate Accruent product with its own API; don't assume facilities and scheduling data share APIs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Facilities and real estate management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Lease, facility, and asset maintenance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Facilities and lease management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Real estate lease and facility data.
